verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Dear Lord, I know You called me And I'm baptized in Your name Yet there is a promise You have made So Lord, I'm asking You To fulfill Your Word That You will fill me With Your Holy Ghost.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I'm asking You to fill me With Your Holy Spirit Fill me, fill me with Your love So Lord, it would not just be a part But a circumcision of my whole heart There'll be no difference In my standing and my state I'm asking You to fill me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: For me to live this Christian life This old man must die For Your Spirit to abide Lord, I don't want reformation But a Holy Ghost transfusion For You have said that I must be born again

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Lord, I see the challenge is rising And so many amongst us are falling Show me Lord, I need another touch If You should come and live in me I'll be having constant victory By the faith that overcomes the world
